zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Leeson III於1509年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯時，他的父親Robert Leeson Jr.27歲，母親Susan Stotesbury30歲。他於大約1528年與Anne Aimee Pargiter在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1544年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Leeson III于1509年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯时，他的父亲Robert Leeson Jr.27岁，母亲Susan Stotesbury30岁。他于大约1528年与Anne Aimee Pargiter在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1544年在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Leeson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Leece
meanings: English: from a medieval female personal name, Lece, a short form of Lettice (from Latin Laetitia, meaning ‘happiness, gaiety’).
Irish: shortened form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Íosa, Manx Mac Guilley Yeesey ‘son of Giolla Íosa (devotee or servant of Jesus)’. Ballaleece (‘Leece's farm’) in Kirk German was the family's main seat.

variants.name: Layson
meanings: English (Kent): possibly a variant of   Leeson  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Leeson III was born in 1509, in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Robert Leeson Jr., was 27 and his mother, Susan Stotesbury, was 30. He married Anne Aimee Pargiter about 1528, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1544, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Leeson III est né en 1509, à Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Leeson Jr., avait 27 ans et sa mère, Susan Stotesbury, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Anne Aimee Pargiter environ 1528, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1544, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Leeson III 1509 in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Leeson Jr. 27 und seine Mutter Susan Stotesbury 30. Er hat um 1528 in England Anne Aimee Pargiter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1544 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Leeson III è nato il nel 1509 nel Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Leeson Jr., aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Susan Stotesbury, aveva 30 anni. Lui sposato Anne Aimee Pargiter circa 1528, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1544, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Leeson IIIが1509年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアトウオルスで生まれた時，父Robert Leeson Jr.は27歳，母Susan Stotesburyは30歳であった。約1528年にイギリスでAnne Aimee Pargiterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1544年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Leeson III(이)가 1509년 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트워스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Leeson Jr.(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Susan Stotesbury(은)는 30세였다. 그는 대략 1528년 영국에서 Anne Aimee Pargiter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1544년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Leeson III nasceu em 1509, em Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Leeson Jr., tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Susan Stotesbury, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Anne Aimee Pargiter aproximadamente 1528, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1544, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Leeson III родился в 1509 г. в местности гритворт, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Leeson Jr. было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Susan Stotesbury, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Anne Aimee Pargiter около 1528 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1544 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Leeson III nació en 1509, en Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Leeson Jr., tenía 27 años y su mamá, Susan Stotesbury, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Anne Aimee Pargiter aproximadamente 1528, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1544, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 35 años.
